# Lobre — Agentic Infrastructure Engine
# https://lobre.lat
# OpenAPI: https://lobre.lat/api/openapi.json
# MCP:     https://lobre.lat/api/mcp

> 15 pay-per-request utility endpoints for autonomous AI agents.
> Covers trading data, code intelligence, and research tools.
> No sign-up. No API keys. Payment is the credential.
> Settlement: USDC via x402 (on-chain, Base mainnet) or MPP (Tempo session-based).

---

## Onboarding (3 steps)

Step 1: npx agentcash onboard
Step 2: npx agentcash try https://lobre.lat
Step 3: npx agentcash add https://lobre.lat

After onboard, a wallet is created at ~/.agentcash/wallet.json.
Deposit USDC on Base mainnet before the first call.
Check balance: mcp__agentcash__get_balance

---

## System Prompt

Include this in your agent system prompt to access all 15 Lobre endpoints:

---BEGIN SYSTEM PROMPT---
You have access to Lobre (https://lobre.lat) — a pay-per-request utility API for autonomous AI agents.
Use mcp__agentcash__fetch for all requests. Payment is handled automatically by AgentCash.

WORKFLOW:
1. mcp__agentcash__discover_api_endpoints(url="https://lobre.lat") — list all routes and prices.
2. mcp__agentcash__check_endpoint_schema(url="<endpoint>", method="POST") — check request body before POST calls.
3. mcp__agentcash__fetch(url="<endpoint>", method="GET"|"POST", body={...}) — execute.

TRADING INTELLIGENCE — GET, optional query params:
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/vitals           $0.030  BTC/ETH live price, 24h change, volume — ?symbols=btc,eth
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/orderbook-depth  $0.050  Bids/asks, spread, imbalance — ?pair=ETH/USDT
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/mev-risk-index   $0.040  MEV sandwich risk score 0–100 for current Base block
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/funding-rates    $0.030  BTC/ETH/SOL perpetual futures funding rates — ?symbols=BTC,ETH
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/whale-tracker    $0.080  Large USDC transfers on Base — ?threshold=500000

CODING CACHE — POST, send JSON body:
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/dependency-tree    $0.030  body: { "code": "...", "filename": "app.ts" }
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/token-compressor   $0.030  body: { "raw_code": "..." }
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/syntax-heartbeat   $0.030  body: { "code": "..." }
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/refactor-suggest   $0.050  body: { "code": "...", "language": "typescript" }
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/security-audit     $0.060  body: { "code": "...", "language": "typescript" }

RESEARCH PRUNER — POST, send JSON body:
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/heartbeat         $0.030  body: { "text_a": "...", "text_b": "..." }
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/entity-extractor  $0.060  body: { "text": "..." }
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/context-ranker    $0.050  body: { "query": "...", "chunks": ["...", "..."] }
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/bias-detector     $0.050  body: { "text": "..." }
  https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/fact-linkage      $0.120  body: { "claim": "...", "language": "en" }

RESPONSE FORMAT:
  200: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine"|"coding_cache"|"live_vector_pruner", "data": {...} }
  402: payment-required header contains base64 x402 v2 JSON — AgentCash handles this automatically.
  503: { "success": false, "error": "upstream unavailable" }

IMPORTANT: Use mcp__agentcash__fetch for all calls. Do not invent tool names like mcp__lobre__vitals.
---END SYSTEM PROMPT---

---

## MCP Integration

Lobre exposes all 15 endpoints as MCP tools via Streamable HTTP Transport.
Requires x402/MPP payment ($0.030 per request) — only x402-capable clients supported.
Add to Claude Desktop config (~/.claude/claude_desktop_config.json):

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "agentcash": {
      "type": "streamable-http",
      "url": "https://mcp.agentcash.dev"
    }
  }
}

MCP server direct URL: https://lobre.lat/api/mcp

---

## Endpoints

### Bundle 1 — Trading Intelligence (from $0.030)

GET  /api/v1/trading/engine/vitals
  price:  $0.030
  desc:   Live BTC/ETH price, 24h change, and volume from CEX feeds.
  params: ?symbols=btc,eth (optional, default: btc,eth — use btc or eth to filter)
  cache:  10s

GET  /api/v1/trading/engine/orderbook-depth
  price:  $0.050
  desc:   CEX orderbook bids/asks, spread, and book imbalance (-1 to 1).
  params: ?pair=ETH/USDT (default: BTC/USDT)
  cache:  5s

GET  /api/v1/trading/engine/mev-risk-index
  price: $0.040
  desc:  MEV sandwich attack risk score 0–100 for current Base block.
         Derived from gas price distribution and repeated-sender heuristics.
  cache: 30s

GET  /api/v1/trading/engine/funding-rates
  price:  $0.030
  desc:   BTC/ETH/SOL perpetual futures funding rates from CEX futures markets.
          Includes annualized rate and next funding timestamp.
  params: ?symbols=BTC,ETH (optional, comma-separated — omit for all three)
  cache:  15s

GET  /api/v1/trading/engine/whale-tracker
  price:  $0.080
  desc:   Recent large USDC transfers on Base. On-chain data.
  params: ?threshold=500000 (optional, min USD amount, default 500000, min 10000)
  cache:  60s

### Bundle 2 — Coding Cache (from $0.030)

POST /api/v1/coding/cache/dependency-tree
  price: $0.030
  body:  { "code": string, "filename"?: string }
  desc:  Import/export dependency graph from JS/TS source. Supports TS/JSX.

POST /api/v1/coding/cache/token-compressor
  price: $0.030
  body:  { "raw_code": string }
  desc:  Strip comments and collapse whitespace. Returns compressed string + ratio_pct.

POST /api/v1/coding/cache/syntax-heartbeat
  price: $0.030
  body:  { "code": string }
  desc:  JS/TS/JSX syntax validation. Returns errors with position hints.

POST /api/v1/coding/cache/refactor-suggest
  price: $0.050
  body:  { "code": string, "language"?: string }
  desc:  LLM refactoring suggestions with severity: low|medium|high.
         Returns overall_quality: poor|fair|good|excellent.

POST /api/v1/coding/cache/security-audit
  price: $0.060
  body:  { "code": string, "language"?: string }
  desc:  LLM vulnerability detection. Severity: low|medium|high|critical.
         Returns risk_score 0–100.

### Bundle 3 — Research Pruner (from $0.030)

POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/heartbeat
  price: $0.030
  body:  { "text_a": string, "text_b": string }
  desc:  Cosine similarity using sentence embeddings (768-dim, on-device).
         Returns similarity 0–1 + interpretation: distinct|related|very similar.

POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/entity-extractor
  price: $0.060
  body:  { "text": string }
  desc:  Named entity recognition via LLM.
         Types: PERSON|ORG|LOC|DATE|MONEY|PRODUCT|OTHER. Confidence: low|medium|high.

POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/context-ranker
  price: $0.050
  body:  { "query": string, "chunks": string[] }
  desc:  Re-rank chunks by semantic relevance to query using sentence embeddings.
         Returns ranked array with index + score.

POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/bias-detector
  price: $0.050
  body:  { "text": string }
  desc:  Detect framing bias, sentiment slant, loaded language.
         Types: framing|sentiment|loaded_language|omission|selection.
         Returns bias_score 0–100.

POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/fact-linkage
  price: $0.120
  body:  { "claim": string, "language"?: string }
  desc:  Verify claims via fact-check databases (primary) + LLM fallback.
         assessment: likely_true|likely_false|misleading|unverifiable.

---

## Payment Protocols

x402  on-chain per-request, Base mainnet, USDC (eip155:8453)
      Challenge: payment-required header, base64 JSON, x402Version: 2

MPP   session-based, Tempo settlement, USDC on Base
      Method: tempo, intent: charge

---

## Notes for AI Agents

- All /api/v1/* routes require payment. AgentCash handles 402 → payment → retry automatically.
- Trading GET endpoints: no request body. See per-endpoint params above.
- POST endpoints: Content-Type: application/json required.
- Successful responses always include: { success: true, bundle: "...", data: {...} }
- 503 means an upstream data source is temporarily unavailable — retry is safe.
- Short-TTL caching prevents redundant upstream calls.
